news_items.headline: N&N: Messick & Smith shut out NL All-Stars
news_items.summary: When you pitch a shutout, you’re gonna win. Someone has to be on the opposite end of that, and playing the role of Tanner Bibee tonight was a group of 9 NL pitchers who gave up 4 runs. 4 runs too many. 10 men pitched for the AL, but we’re focusing only on Parker Messick […]

news_items.summary: Nothing quite went Philadelphia's way this week, and a fan base known for its fierce loyalty and intense disdain for rivals made its feelings known.

news_items.headline: Shaikin: 'You never know when it's your last.' Mike Trout savors every moment of this All-Star Game
news_items.summary: This year's All-Star Game didn't have a lot of drama, but it did have a lot of tributes to Angels star Mike Trout, who appreciated every moment.
